_meta.description: Wave 1 lifecycle normalization overlay for core operational entities, recovery objects, and execution-critical masters.

customers.purpose: Controls customer commercial release eligibility, order acceptance, and evidence retention on the customer master.

vendors.purpose: Controls supplier qualification and spend authorization before purchasing or receiving release.

items.purpose: Controls release, obsolescence, and inventory-usable truth for the shared item master without duplicating inventory item identity.

hcm_employees.purpose: Controls labor qualification, access eligibility, and employee release into production and compliance scopes.

employees.purpose: Controls production qualification, permit eligibility, and employee availability in the shopfloor competency baseline.

equipment.purpose: Controls equipment qualification, lockout, and usable-machine release before maintenance, calibration, and production execution.

tools.purpose: Controls tool and measuring-device release, wear containment, and retirement before use on production or inspection operations.

crm_customer_touchpoints.purpose: Controls customer-care follow-up, escalation, and closure so service exceptions cannot disappear into note-only touchpoints.

purchase_requisitions.purpose: Controls demand authorization before sourcing or supplier PO creation so off-contract purchases cannot bypass planning gates.

supplier_asns.purpose: Controls inbound supplier notice, discrepancy handling, and receiving readiness before physical receipt hits stock truth.

improvement_projects.purpose: Controls lean improvement intake, approval, implementation, verification, and closure so kaizen/corrective initiatives can be measured against realized benefit instead of staying as unmanaged ideas.

mes_dispatch_queue.purpose: Controls shopfloor dispatch release, hold, and execution closure so operations cannot start or disappear from queue outside the governed MES release horizon.

production_schedule.purpose: Controls finite schedule review, publication, freeze, and closure so the released factory plan remains a governed source for capacity, dispatch, and OTIF commitments.

purchase_receipts.purpose: Controls receipt acceptance, quarantine, and putaway so physical stock cannot leak before IQC and financial matching are settled.

purchase_receipt_corrections.purpose: Controls governed correction and reversal after receipt, IQC, or invoice impact so partial completion can be reconciled instead of patched manually.

ap_invoices.purpose: Controls AP three-way match, hold, posting, and close so procurement correction cannot bypass financial truth.

tms_shipments.purpose: Controls outbound shipment release, dispatch, proof of delivery, and closure against OTIF and release-gate requirements.

warehouses.purpose: Controls warehouse release, hold, and archive so blocked storage areas cannot silently remain active for receiving, picking, or shipment.

inventory_transactions.purpose: Controls movement posting, hold, and reversal so inventory truth remains reconcilable under corrections and audit.

work_orders.purpose: Controls manufacturing WO dispatch, execution, and quality hold separate from JO planning so shopfloor release is governed at the executable level.

job_operations.purpose: Controls operation-level execution, hold, completion, and scrap so genealogy and in-process quality can anchor to the actual operation step.

ipqc_inspections.purpose: Controls in-process inspection queue, rejection, and reinspection so hold/quarantine propagation starts before final inspection and shipping.

oqc_inspections.purpose: Controls final and outbound quality disposition using the existing result column until a richer outbound inspection split is required.

rma_orders.purpose: Controls customer-return authorization, receipt, evaluation, and commercial closure using the existing RMA backbone until a multi-line return model is needed.

pm_maintenance_plans.purpose: Controls preventive-maintenance plan approval, release, hold, and retirement so recurring PM cadence stays auditable before work orders are auto-released.

ehs_incidents.purpose: Controls incident triage, containment, investigation, and closure so safety events cannot bypass root-cause and corrective-action loops.

qual_compliance_obligations.purpose: Controls obligation due, waiver, and closure so permits, audits, and regulatory actions have a governed compliance anchor.

ehs_permit_register.purpose: Controls permit submission, approval, activation, suspension, expiry, and closure so hazardous or regulated work cannot proceed outside a governed permit-to-work register.

lean_5s_audits.purpose: Controls 5S audit planning, execution, follow-up, verification, and closure so visual-factory discipline becomes a governed lean loop instead of a score-only snapshot.

pm_equipment_master.purpose: Controls the maintenance equipment shell that schedules PM, lockout, and lifecycle disposition while remaining state-aligned with the canonical equipment master.

audit.purpose: Controls audit execution, verification, and closure so audit evidence does not depend on a separate workflow engine bridge before backend rollout.

deviation.purpose: Controls legacy deviation records under guarded runtime so exception governance remains auditable without a separate persisted workflow bridge.

deviations.purpose: Controls active deviation permits and exception closure in the live quality stream without depending on a deferred workflow engine bridge.

engineering_change_requests.purpose: Controls engineering change request progression under guarded runtime so release governance exists before any separate PLM workflow engine is introduced.

item.purpose: Controls legacy single-item master lifecycle under guarded runtime so alias records do not remain blocked on a workflow engine bridge.

ap_ar_invoices.purpose: Controls invoice payment state, dispute handling, and financial close visibility before cash recognition is considered complete.

fin_fixed_assets.purpose: Controls fixed-asset operational availability, hold, retirement, and disposal governance for accounting and maintenance alignment.

freight_orders.purpose: Controls freight execution from booking through delivery closure so shipment release, carrier handoff, and proof-of-delivery stay under governed logistics truth.

safety_observations.purpose: Controls safety good-catch and hazard observations through assignment, containment, and closure so frontline EHS risks cannot disappear into note-only reporting.
